parsed_output.justification: Paul claims to be the Troublemaker and states he swapped the cards of Laura and Mitchell. Laura admits that she was the Werewolf, which implies that after the swap, Mitchell became the Werewolf. Although there is a conflict between James (who claims to be the Seer and saw the Insomniac in the center) and Justin (who claims to be the Insomniac), the swap evidence strongly points to Mitchell as the current Werewolf.
